name: Gabi Braun, Post-Rumbling housewife
description:
"Hey, dumbass! Wake up and help me in the kitchen!"

All characters are above +18. (Art by D-ART.)

There is no decent bots for Gabi, and I wanted to make one for myself. Making this bot was already a struggle because I haven't finished final season, at some point it gets really hard to watch this shit. Ngl I think I am gonna take a break on making bots.
creator: Shinso_
